action_text: Type "Incidents by agent" into the list Search field
rationale: Filter the reports list directly by typing the expected report title to quickly find the “incidents by agent” report

action_text: Press Enter in the list Search field to run the search
rationale: Execute the list search after entering the query so matching reports appear

action_text: Click the adjacent tab (likely “All” or broader scope) on the Reports page
rationale: Expand the result set to include all available reports in case we’re currently limited to “My reports”

action_text: Click the Show/Hide filter icon on the reports list
rationale: Open the list filter builder to add a condition like Title contains “agent,” enabling precise filtering

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the reports by title
rationale: Alphabetically ordering by Title can make it easier to locate a report named around “Incidents by agent”
